23.description: Please indicate when this occurred and whether you received support after the attempt. You may share as much or as little as you feel comfortable.

80.variations:
• Initial assessment and follow-up assessment with a psychiatrist
  • 3 individual sessions per week with a Clinical Psychologist and/or a Clinical Counselor
  • Mandatory daily psycho-educational group sessions, interactive didactic lectures and therapeutic groups
  • One-hour massage per week
  • One outing per week
  • Gourmet dining: three exquisite meals daily
  • Daily physical activities: Gym twice a day
  • Two yoga sessions per week
  • Use of icebath and sauna
  • 24/7 free fiber optic WIFI access
  • Complimentary airport transfers
  • Weekly park walk/hike
  • Comprehensive aftercare plan
  • Relapse prevention guarantee program (included in 12+ week programs only)
    • MCMI test (Millon Clinical Multiaxial Inventory test)
  • Full check-up that includes:
    • Blood pressure
    • BMI
    • Complete blood count
    • Fasting blood glucose
    • Total lipid profile
    • Kidney function test
    • Liver function test
    • Inflammation marker (CRP)
    • Urine examination
    • CRP test
